title: ADHD Executive Function Research for Trait Implementation
description: The architecture is ready for 19 ADHD trait implementations. Each trait needs clinically-accurate struggle patterns, evidence-based coaching strategies, and real-world success stories. Research needed for each trait.
traits_needing_research: Working Memory — capacity limitations, decay rates, interference patterns
Time Blindness — time perception distortions, deadline awareness failure patterns
Emotional Dysregulation — emotional lability, rejection sensitivity, intensity patterns
Hyperfocus — triggers, duration patterns, transition-out difficulty
Task Initiation — activation energy requirements, avoidance patterns
Frustration Tolerance — threshold levels, escalation patterns
Planning Deficit — sequential planning failures, prioritization difficulties
Transition Difficulty — task-switching costs, perseveration patterns
Self-Monitoring — metacognitive awareness gaps, error detection failures
Impulse Control — behavioral inhibition, delayed gratification challenges
Focus Fatigue — mental endurance curves, recovery patterns
Effort Perception — effort discounting, reward sensitivity
Stress Sensitivity — threshold and accumulation patterns
Sensory Sensitivity — overstimulation triggers, processing differences
Social Challenges — conversation management, social cue processing
Sensory Seeking — stimulation-seeking patterns, self-regulation through sensation
Identity Challenges — self-concept impacts, masking and burnout from masking

for_each_trait.struggle_indicators: List of specific, measurable struggle patterns
for_each_trait.difficulty_modifiers: How the trait affects task difficulty (1.0 = no effect, 2.0 = doubles difficulty)
for_each_trait.cognitive_load_impact: How much additional cognitive load the trait adds (0.0 to 0.5)
for_each_trait.quality_impact: How much the trait reduces task quality (0.0 to 0.3)
for_each_trait.time_impact: How much the trait increases task completion time (1.0 to 2.5x)
for_each_trait.real_world_insights: Success stories from ADHD individuals who've managed this trait
